description: Use this API to change the value of an element of the VAR array. The element is specified relative to the beginning of the VAR array. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = change_var(number, newval)

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: Var number or array index (must be between 1 and the number of vars allowed at the present size level of psse). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: newval
parameters.description: New value to be assigned to var (number). (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
